jei.hell_yeah_stuff.sunflower_seeds.info: Crafted from a vanilla sunflower (1 sunflower -> 3 seeds). Roast in a furnace for roasted seeds, or crush with an anvil for oil.
jei.hell_yeah_stuff.crushed_seeds.info: Throw sunflower seeds on the ground and drop an anvil on them — the falling anvil crushes them into crushed seeds.
jei.hell_yeah_stuff.sunflower_oil.info: Crafted from 3 crushed seeds and a glass bottle. Pour into an empty cauldron (3 bottles fill it), just like water. A full cauldron is used for quenching iron.
jei.hell_yeah_stuff.hardened_iron.info: Re-smelt an iron ingot in a blast furnace — it comes out hot (20 minutes until cooled, timer in tooltip). While hot, toss it into a full cauldron of sunflower oil to quench it. The oil darkens with each quench and spoils after the 5th. Hardened iron is used to craft darts.
jei.hell_yeah_stuff.iron_ingot.info: An ingot taken from a blast furnace stays hot for 20 minutes (glints periodically). A hot ingot can be quenched in a full cauldron of sunflower oil.
